overlay_color.a: temp.edge = q.time_of_day <= 0.5 ? q.time_of_day : 1 - q.time_of_day; temp.alpha = temp.edge < 0.180556 ? 1.0 : 0.0; temp.alpha = temp.edge >= 0.180556 && temp.edge < 0.190972 ? 1.0 + (0.675 - 1.0) * math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((temp.edge - 0.180556) / 0.010416, 0, 1)) : temp.alpha; temp.alpha = temp.edge >= 0.190972 && temp.edge < 0.211806 ? 0.675 + (0.4 - 0.675) * math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((temp.edge - 0.190972) / 0.020834, 0, 1)) : temp.alpha; temp.alpha = temp.edge >= 0.211806 && temp.edge < 0.260417 ? 0.4 + (0.02 - 0.4) * math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((temp.edge - 0.211806) / 0.048611, 0, 1)) : temp.alpha; temp.alpha = temp.edge >= 0.260417 && temp.edge < 0.263889 ? 0.02 * (1 - math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((temp.edge - 0.260417) / 0.003472, 0, 1))) : temp.alpha; return temp.alpha;
